title: Stabx Modern Guns
description: Addon for MrCrayfish Gun Mod Adding so many  Realistic Guns
body:
# **ABOUT**:
 Stabx Modern Guns is an Add-on for MrCrayfish Gun mod , that adds High Quality and Realistic Guns to Minecraft making it the Highest quality Addon ever.

Join My Stabx Community official Discord server
https://discord.gg/j48yxzrWAJ

If you wanna play this mod with the other guys on my community
Join My Elite Warfare Official Discord server 
https://discord.gg/Pa9am6txtW


## **BEFORE YOU DOWNLOAD**

This Mod Requires these Following mods as because they're not available on Modrinth but only on Curseforge so yeah 👍


Required Dependencies to Run the mod

1st. **MrCrayFishes Gun mod** 
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mrcrayfishs-gun-mod

2nd. **Framework (1.18.2+)**
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework

3rd.  **Obfuscate (For 1.16.5 only)**
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/obfuscate

4th. **Mrcrayfish Unofficial 1.20.1** for stabx guns 1.20.1 mod version
      https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mrcrayfishs-gun-mod-unofficial

This mod is Sponsored by Kinetic Hosting 
Use the Code "STABXKING" to get a 15% discount at your First purchase of Minecraft server

https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=100

**FOR THE CRAFTING RECIPES PLEASE INSTALL A JEI MOD FOR THAT**

## **F.A.Q**

Q1: **When update to 1.20.1?**

Ans: This mod now been updated to 1.20.1 now 1.20.1 reqires mrcrayfish 1.20.1 unofficial one u can find it right here
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mrcrayfishs-gun-mod-unofficial

Q2: **Will you backport to 1.12.2?**

Ans: No, I hate that version so much it's extremely outdated , and I only develop for latest versions, Come on it is 2023 and it is not Supported by forge either.


Yours Truly Stabilizer King 👑
